Media Library

Videos, Reels & Media Content by BhummiVastu

A curated library of educational videos, reels, posts, and social media content shared by Vastu Acharya Minu Saini — designed to help visitors quickly explore her knowledge, communication style, and practical guidance.

Media Items

Featured

Social

Authority Signals

Mentorship Milestone

With Vastu Acharya Sri Khushdeep Bansal

Beyond videos, reels, and social posts, this image reflects a defining milestone in Minu Saini’s journey — receiving guidance from Vastu Acharya Sri Khushdeep Bansal, her Guru and Margdarshak in the MahaVastu tradition.

It represents the lineage, discipline, and dharmic responsibility behind BhummiVastu’s work — not just media presence, but a practice rooted in authentic guidance and spiritual accountability.

Guided Learning MahaVastu Lineage Dharmic Practice
